title: Armor Section Targeting
summary: Concentrate fire on damaged armor sections to maximize penetration.
details: Ships have multiple armor sections. Once a section is damaged or depleted, continue hitting that section for maximum effect. Watch for visual cues of armor degradation: venting atmosphere, exposed internals, secondary explosions. Rear and ventral armor is typically weaker than forward sections. Communicate damaged sections to wingmen for coordinated fire.
annotations: Spreading fire across all sections is inefficient.
Engine hits on capital ships can be mission kills.
